title: Preview · plan & questions awaiting your review
now: Awaiting your review of the plan and the open questions
summary:
## Plan ready for review 📝

This is the **ELABORATE / PLAN GATE** look — the agent has explored the area, drafted a plan, and is now waiting on you. The action bar at the bottom is in **awaiting** state: review the plan blocks below, answer the open questions, optionally comment on any block, then hit **Submit → Approve**.

**What this fixture demonstrates:** plan blocks you can comment on, a choice question, a free-text question, an anchored discussion thread (see block `b2`), the work-stream summary chip, and the left info sidebar — all the surfaces the dashboard shows while it waits for a human.

planBlocks.title: 1. Add the fixtures directory
planBlocks.body: Create `templates/fixtures/<phase>/` with the data files the server serves (`state.json`, `dashboard.json`, `replies.json`, `signals.json`, `chat.jsonl`, `telemetry.jsonl`). Committed, because `.workflow/` is gitignored.

planBlocks.title: 2. The preview harness script
planBlocks.body: `scripts/preview.py` copies each fixture into `.workflow/tasks/`, stamps the **current** `dashboard.html` as each task's `index.html`, resolves the `baseCommit` for a live diff, then (re)starts the server and opens `/hub`.

planBlocks.title: 3. Wire `python dev.py preview`
planBlocks.body: A thin sub-command in `dev.py` so the whole thing is one command. Flags mirror `serve`: `--no-browser`, plus `--clean` to remove the preview tasks.

planBlocks.title: 4. A smoke test
planBlocks.body: One `unittest` in `tests/` that loads every fixture's JSON and asserts the required keys — a cheap guard so a malformed fixture fails CI instead of rendering blank.

questions.text: How many phase fixtures should ship?
Should the Changes tab show a real git diff?
options: Yes — pin baseCommit to an older commit (recommended)
No — leave it empty for preview

questions.text: Anything else the preview should exercise that's missing here?
